class.name: LightListItem
class.brief_description: Item for light selector indicating which lights it should light up
class.description: Item for light selector indicating which lights it should light up. It applies to the cabin where the selector is located at

members.member: Turns head light on or off
Turns red signal on the left on or off
Turns white signal on the left on or off
Turns red signal on the right on or off
Turns white signal on the right on or off
